title: From Magic Strings to Named Constants
problem: Hardcoded strings scattered in build scripts — 'demo', 'ja', 'production'. IDE can't navigate to their meaning. Typos fail silently.
decision: Named constants in lib/vex-config.js. Category.DEMO, Feature.LANG, Language.JA. Every build script imports and uses the constant, never the string literal.
lesson: The variable name is the intention. The string value is irrelevant.
impact: IDE-navigable, self-documenting, auditable via grep for constant usage.
